# 1inow

> 1inow is a private personal command center for projects, tasks, voice capture, decisions, and daily execution.

## Public pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and entry point.
- [Strategic vs Tactical](/principles/strategic-vs-tactical): Operating principle for decision and execution balance.
- [Sign in](/auth): Access the private workspace.

## Product direction

- Voice capture and Voice Inbox are available without external AI services.
- External AI, speech-to-text, and text-to-speech providers require explicit approval and environment configuration before use.
- The authenticated workspace contains dashboard, projects, tasks, calendar, inbox, communication, people, reports, intelligence, admin, and settings modules.
